title: Cab rides & travel support
summary: Help cover local travel for participants, facilitators, and materials moving between village sites, transit points, and event locations.
lastUpdated: Log opens with the first contribution
statusNote: Every ride or travel expense will be documented here once this fund becomes active.

title: Stationery for kids
summary: Support notebooks, pens, paper, printouts, and workshop materials used with children and young participants in Khandera.
lastUpdated: Log opens with the first contribution
statusNote: Bills and remaining balance will be updated here after each stationery purchase.

title: Art materials & equipment
summary: Contribute toward paints, tools, projection needs, mime props, and other working materials for Dadri Forecast activities.
lastUpdated: Log opens with the first contribution
statusNote: Equipment and supply use will be listed here with expense notes as the archive grows.

title: Gallery & exhibition fund
summary: Reserve support for future exhibitions, installation needs, display material, transport, and public presentation when the rollout begins.
statusNote: This section will track exhibition-specific spending once that phase opens up.

title: Project-specific donations
summary: Direct a contribution to a particular Dadri Forecast project, residency need, emergency expense, or community-led requirement.
statusNote: Use the donor form to mention the exact project or need you want your contribution to support.
